description: Following a sponsor Quality Assurance (QA) audit, update the CRF compliance parameters for the 'Safety Follow-up' event in the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024). Login to OpenClinica (root / Admin123!) and configure the 'Adverse Events' CRF to require a password (Electronic Signature), the 'Lab Results' CRF to require Double Data Entry, and the 'Quality of Life' CRF to be optional (Required: No). Save the updated event definition configuration.
